brief.objective: introduce CALL as a leadership development and improvement planning tool
keyMessages: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.
proofPoints: The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
The CALL site says CALL provides unique tools and customized services for professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
The What We Do page says CALL is school- and district-wide.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement.
Leadership for learning, grounded in feedback
A practical system for school improvement planning
subheadOptions: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning provides tools, customized services, and feedback systems that support school and district.
CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
copy.body: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement. For principals, this draft focuses on leadership for learning, professional growth, and school improvement planning.
bullets: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.
The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement. Focus on the work.
fittedCopy.deck: CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning through a user-friendly school-wide assessment and feedback system.
proofPoints: CALL provides school-wide needs assessment and feedback for school improvement.
CALL offers practical, action-oriented data to support leadership for learning.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: large campaign headline at left, concise deck beneath, two proof points grouped as a lower evidence band, and one compact CTA owned by the app
designRecipe.artDirection: principal-facing CALL campaign flyer with an editorial split: calm education-leadership atmosphere, school improvement planning cues, collaborative data review, and subtle assessment-to-action visual flow on the right
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: shape negative space with light gradients, subject cropping, and directional lines to support app-set text; do not create boxes, fake copy, logos, CTA labels, or contact bars
designRecipe.appComposition: official logo remains top-left; app typesets all real message content in the left editorial stack while full-bleed branded imagery occupies and energizes the right field with a lower rhythm for proof and action
promptDirectives: Design the whole 4:5 flyer concept, not a decorative background.
Keep the left message zone clean and readable through intentional negative space.
Use right-side visual storytelling about principals using data for school improvement.
Create a professional, trustworthy education-leadership tone for CALL.
No fake text, fake logos, placeholder panels, UI cards, or contact strips.

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CALL prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): fake dashboard, stock workshop.

issues: Deck copy is too tall for the selected template.

imageResults.revisedPrompt:
Create a 1024x1536 portrait full-bleed campaign art plate for a professional education-leadership flyer. This is an app-composed marketing artifact background/visual plate: no readable text and no logos. Editorial split composition: clean, readable negative-space message zone on the left, richer visual storytelling on the right field. Overall tone steady, clear, credible, calm, leadership-oriented, premium NY media/ad-agency quality.

Scene and subject: authentic editorial photography or refined photorealistic-illustrative atmosphere of a school principal and small leadership team engaged in strategic school improvement planning. Show educators in a reflective data-informed discussion, reviewing feedback reports and planning materials, but all pages/screens must be blank, blurred, abstract, or illegible with no letters, numbers, charts, labels, or readable marks. Avoid close-up faces and detailed hands; crop figures tastefully from mid-distance or over-the-shoulder. Convey leadership for learning, professional growth, feedback, school improvement planning, and principal-facing strategy.

Composition: portrait 4:5-ish full-page flyer concept, 1024x1536. Left 40–45% reserved as clean type-safe editorial stack zone with intentional negative space, subtle light gradient, low texture, high contrast for future app-set headline/deck/proof/CTA. Do not create boxes, panels, cards, modules, contact bars, UI, placeholders, or document layout scaffolding. Right 55–60% contains the visual story: leadership team around a planning table or collaborative school office setting, layered depth, soft directional lines from table edges/paper edges/window light guiding eye toward the left message zone. Lower portion can support a future evidence band through calm tonal structure only, not boxed.

Brand color atmosphere: use deep navy #142836, teal #0081A4, green #5EA974, and warm orange #F2975E as subtle accents in light, materials, clothing, sticky-note-like color blocks only if completely text-free, and environmental details. Professional school environment, not corporate boardroom, not generic PD workshop, not random classroom stock. No fake dashboards, no readable charts, no literal logo-like marks, no chevrons, arrows, mountain marks, badges, seals, wordmarks, initials, or background logo patterns.

Visual details: polished layered depth, premium editorial lighting, warm natural window light, calm school leadership atmosphere, planning table with abstract reports/notes that have only soft shapes or texture, no symbols or text. Keep important visual energy away from trim/crop edges. The final image must be text-free full-bleed campaign art plate, ready for an app to overlay official logo top-left and all real copy on the left editorial stack.

Strict negatives: absolutely no readable text, letters, numbers, labels, fake paragraphs, book titles, publisher names, email addresses, URLs, phone numbers, citations, lorem ipsum, document panels, blank boxes, placeholder modules, mock UI, cards, fake text, fake charts, icons with labels, contact bars, duplicate logos, fake logos, fake seals, fake badges, fake book titles, fake publisher brands, logo-like marks, wordmarks, chevrons, arrows, mountain logos, malformed UI, brochure scaffolding, invented claims, endorsement imagery, close-up faces, detailed hands, posed training-room stock, washed-out empty fade, generic meeting-table cliché.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: A user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) provides unique tools and customized services to support professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL professional growth and leadership development

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement. Focus on the work.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL focus

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) is a school- and district-wide leadership assessment and feedback system.
